text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you help keep our community friendly and helpful. Let us know if you need anything to get started!

Hi guide_sam! Welcome to the community as an event helper. We can't wait to see the fun and engaging events you'll help organize for our members. Reach out if you have any questions about our event processes!

Welcome newbie_kim! So glad you're joining our community as a member. Take a look around, introduce yourself in the introductions channel, and don't hesitate to ask if you have any questions. We're happy to have you here!

Welcome mentor_lina! We're thrilled to have you join as a community mentor. Our members will benefit so much from your experience and guidance. Let us know if you need access to any mentor-specific resources to get started!
